name: InfiniteScrollDirective
description: Tool directive used to achieve the infinite scroll mechanism.

inputs.name: scrollOffset
inputs.description: Scroll PX at which the onScrollAction event is fired.

inputs.name: scrollPercent
inputs.description: Scroll percentage at which the onScrollAction event is fired.

outputs.name: onScrollAction
outputs.description: Event emitted when the scrollPercent threshold is met.
